faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I transfer my domain to DraveUp?
faq.a1: Transferring is easy. Unlock your domain at your current registrar, get the auth code, and enter it in our transfer tool. The process takes 5–7 days.
faq.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a2: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, bank transfers, and many local payment methods depending on your region.
faq.q3: Can I get a refund if I'm not satisfied?
faq.a3: Yes. We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on hosting plans and a 5-day refund window on domains.
faq.q4: Do you offer domain privacy for free?
faq.a4: Yes! WHOIS privacy protection is included at no extra charge on all eligible domain registrations.
faq.q5: How do I connect my domain to my website?
faq.a5: Log in to your Client Area, go to DNS Management, and update your nameservers or A records. We provide step-by-step guides for every major hosting provider.
faq.a6: Yes. We offer white-label reseller hosting and domain reselling programs. Contact our sales team to learn more.
